description: The concerns are not limited to former awardees. After the ministry announced the re-evaluation process, Asian Championships gold medallist decathlete Tejaswin Shankar, who has been recommended for the Arjuna Award, publicly criticised the delay. "This delay is not just de-motivating to athletes and coaches but also a sign of disrespect," he posted on X in April.

description: Tamil Nadu BJP leader Amar Prasad has resigned from the party, following in the footsteps of former state president K Annamalai. Prasad announced his departure on social media, stating his intention to join Annamalai in his future political endeavors. This move signals a significant shift within the state's political landscape.

Bill Gates warns Microsoft, Amazon, Google on data center push
description: Bill Gates has told the AI industry it does not have permission to drive up household electricity bills, warning Amazon, Google, Meta and Microsoft that the old utility-funded grid model is finished. Speaking on CNBC, the Microsoft co-founder said hyperscalers must now pick data centre sites where the economics and politics hold. With 48 projects worth $156 billion already blocked in 2025 and public opposition at record highs, the buildout is colliding with sentiment.

title: EU orders Meta to give OpenAI and other AI rivals free access to WhatsApp
description: EU antitrust regulators have ordered Meta to grant rival AI companies free access to WhatsApp's business API. This decision comes amid an investigation into claims that Meta unfairly favored its own AI assistant. The order aims to ensure fair competition in the rapidly evolving AI market, with Meta facing potential fines if found in breach of rules.

title: Roger Federer car collection: Luxury cars, SUVs and Mercedes icons
description: Roger Federer still has eyes on him; he has been on the Mercedes-Benz radar since forever and is an embodiment of a luxury lifestyle. He has an array of beautiful sports cars, superior SUVs and luxury cars that beautifully depict his sophisticated personality. He's not a crazy car enthusiast and wants his garage to be appreciated by tennis fans for its performance and usability, which is why his collection is one of the most loved in tennis.

title: Walmart immigration vote: Shareholders reject report as retailer downplays visa risks
description: Walmart shareholders rejected a proposal urging a report on US immigration policy's impact on operations. The proposal cited potential workforce and supply chain risks due to policy shifts. Walmart stated it hasn't faced significant disruptions, noting its limited reliance on employment-based visas for specialized roles.

title: Meet Fabrice Bellard: French engineer behind YouTube, Netflix and TikTok
BTS' Dynamite becomes FIFA World Cup anthem among football fans
description: BTS’ hit song “Dynamite” has unexpectedly become part of a viral FIFA World Cup trend on TikTok and X. Football fans are using the track in South Korea-themed match edits, with several clips reportedly crossing 500,000 likes. The trend sparked hilarious reactions from ARMY members, many surprised that even non-K-pop fans know the song. Social media users say the crossover feels natural, proving BTS’ global cultural influence continues to stretch far beyond music and into sports culture.
